config.script:
#include "50203"
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' funkcja odpowiada za zwijanie/rozwijanie NX sekcji #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- sub nx_section_hideshow_forwarder(byref oPage,byval idPictureCtrl) dim oPicture : set oPicture = oPage.ctrl(idPictureCtrl) dim oStartRow : set oStartRow = oPicture.parent.parent dim bHide : bHide = (oPicture.image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS) nx_section_hideshow_perform oPage,oStartRow,idPictureCtrl,bHide end sub
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' otwiera/zamyka sekcje #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- sub nx_section_hideshow_perform(byref oPage,byref oStartRow,byval iSectionMarker,byval bHide) dim oRow : set oRow = oStartRow.nextelement do while not oRow is nothing if nx_get_ctrl_userprop_value(oRow,PROPC_SECTION_END) = iSectionMarker then exit do end if oRow.hide = bHide set oRow = oRow.nextelement loop dim oPicture : set oPicture = oPage.ctrl(iSectionMarker) if bHide then oPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_PLUS) oPicture.tip = "Rozwiń" else oPicture.image = clng(PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS) oPicture.tip = "Zwiń" end if end sub
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' zachowuje w profilu uzytkownika stan sekcji #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- function nx_section_save_state_forwarder(byref oPage,byval idProfile,byval strNXSectionInitialState) nx_section_save_state_forwarder = true dim strState : strState = nx_get_open_sections(oPage).join_to_string(";") if strState <> strNXSectionInitialState then dim pSubTrans set pSubTrans=trans_.createsubtran() setuserprofile idProfile, strState nx_section_save_state_forwarder = trans_.saveobjects() set pSubTrans=nothing end if end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' tworzy tablice identyfikatorow sekcji (idPicture) #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- function nx_get_open_sections(byref oPage) dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = nx_.new_array() Dim oTopElement: set oTopElement = oPage.topelement nx_get_open_sections_internal oTopElement,oNXArray set nx_get_open_sections = oNXArray end function
private sub nx_get_open_sections_internal(byref oParentElement,byref oNXArray) dim oElement for each oElement in oParentElement select case oElement.Type case CTRL_TYPE_TABLE dim oRow for each oRow in oElement.body if nx_get_ctrl_userprop_value(oRow,PROPC_SECTION_START) = 1 then if oRow.element(1).element(1).image = PICTURE_SMALL_MINUS then oNXArray.add oRow.element(1).element(1).ident end if end if dim oCell for each oCell in oRow nx_get_open_sections_internal oCell,oNXArray next next case CTRL_TYPE_PARAGRAPH,CTRL_TYPE_TABITEM,CTRL_TYPE_PAGEMAN nx_get_open_sections_internal oElement,oNXArray end select next end sub
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment 'odtwarza stan sekcji #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- function nx_section_load_state_forwarer(byref oPage,byval idProfile) dim strInitialState : strInitialState = nx_get_current_userprofile_value(idProfile) dim oNXArray : set oNXArray = nx_.new_array() oNXArray.split_string strInitialState,";" nx_set_open_sections oPage,oNXArray nx_section_load_state_forwarer = strInitialState end function
#comment '-------------------------------------q------------------- #comment ' ustawia stan sekcji na podstawie tablicy #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- function nx_set_open_sections(byref oPage,byref oNXArray) Dim oTopElement: set oTopElement = oPage.topelement nx_set_open_sections_internal oPage,oTopElement,oNXArray,true end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment 'otwiera / zamyka wszystkie sekcje #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- function nx_open_close_all_sections(byref oPage,byval bOpenAlways) Dim oTopElement: set oTopElement = oPage.topelement nx_set_open_sections_internal oPage,oTopElement,nothing,bOpenAlways end function
private sub nx_set_open_sections_internal(byref oPage,byref oParentElement,byref oNXArray,byval bOpenAlways) dim oElement for each oElement in oParentElement select case oElement.Type case CTRL_TYPE_TABLE dim oRow for each oRow in oElement.body if nx_get_ctrl_userprop_value(oRow,PROPC_SECTION_START) = 1 then dim iSectionMarker : iSectionMarker = oRow.element(1).element(1).ident dim bHide if not oNXArray is nothing then bHide = (oNXArray.find(cstr(iSectionMarker)) = -1) else bHide = not bOpenAlways end if nx_section_hideshow_perform oPage,oRow,iSectionMarker,bHide end if dim oCell for each oCell in oRow nx_set_open_sections_internal oPage,oCell,oNXArray,bOpenAlways next next case CTRL_TYPE_PARAGRAPH,CTRL_TYPE_TABITEM,CTRL_TYPE_PAGEMAN nx_set_open_sections_internal oPage,oElement,oNXArray,bOpenAlways end select next end sub
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' zwraca wartosc userprop dla property idProp i kontrolki oCtrl #comment '-------------------------------------------------------- function nx_get_ctrl_userprop_value(byref oCtrl,byval idProp) nx_get_ctrl_userprop_value = -1 dim oUserProp : set oUserProp = oCtrl.userprop if oUserProp is nothing then exit function end if if not oUserProp.exists(idProp) then exit function end if nx_get_ctrl_userprop_value = oUserProp.prop(idProp) end function
